crons.name: checkin-scheduler
crons.comment: COA-29: Send personalized morning check-in WhatsApp messages. Runs every 30 min — timezone-aware scheduler fires only when athlete is in their send window.

crons.name: oura-daily-sync
crons.comment: COA-26: Pull yesterday Oura readiness, sleep, HRV for all athletes at 6 AM UTC daily

crons.name: weekly-reports
crons.comment: COA-118: Auto-generate weekly training report drafts every Monday at 7 AM UTC
